body.thing: BaseDomain.run threads cwd through to the attempt/loop for edit-tool isolation
body.intention: BaseDomain.run(ticket, cwd=X) reaches _run_attempt (and the loop's edit tools) with cwd=X, so an edit-capable build can run off an isolated dir instead of the live _REPO_ROOT
